# Media Generation Adapter

The adapter isolates OPREALM business state from provider-specific APIs.

Canonical source: [00-source-of-truth.md](00-source-of-truth.md).


## Responsibilities

- Normalize provider inputs and outputs.
- Apply child/business safety and claim constraints.
- Record provider job IDs and costs.
- Store generated assets in OPREALM asset records.
- Return deterministic failure categories for retries and refunds.
- Prevent video jobs unless Pre-Video Gate passes.

## Provider Rule

Do not expose provider keys to clients. Do not let provider-specific recipe names leak into the primary OPREALM UI.
